caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses is captured in a medium shot, speaking into a black microphone. He wears a light blue button-down shirt with a subtle floral or leaf pattern and a long beaded necklace featuring red, white, and blue beads. He is positioned against a background of horizontal light-brown wooden slats. The text "ORCA" is visible in a white box on the right side of the frame. Throughout the sequence, the man is talking, with his mouth opening and closing as he speaks. His head tilts slightly downward and to the side as the video progresses. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a consistent composition of the man and the microphone as he delivers his speech.
